creator: lightside@gmx.com
text: In general, it is useful to backup ~/.pioneer directory for new version, then delete it before start. It is possible to use the same ~/.pioneer/savefiles directory in case of compatibility with new version. Also, there could be a cache of shaders inside of ~/.nv/GLCache directory, which might be a cause of graphical artifacts, in case of NVidia video card used, but solvable with resolution changes in-game, etc.
